=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/catchToOrElseSucceed_preview.ts(4,3): suggestion TS377095: `Effect.orElseSucceed` expresses the same recovery more directly than `Effect.catch` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(catchToOrElseSucceed)


==== /.src/catchToOrElseSucceed_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    export const program = Effect.fail("error").pipe(
      Effect.catch(() => Effect.succeed(42))
      ~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377095: `Effect.orElseSucceed` expresses the same recovery more directly than `Effect.catch` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(catchToOrElseSucceed)
    )
